title: Tertiary structure models for two RNAPuzzles targets generated by the RNA-MobiSeq approach
author: Shi, Yazhou
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains five refined RNA 3D models for the PZ62 target in the RNA-Puzzles challenge. Compared to the previously uploaded predictions (10.5281/zenodo.15320479), these models were also generated by applying RNA-MobiSeq but with a fivefold increase in RNA-BRiQ sampling, thereby enhancing the conformational space exploration. More details can be found in https://zenodo.org/records/15320479
